'''Sensor Control''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Space station/Legends|space station]]. In [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], it was [[Battle of the Anoat Main Sensor Array|destroyed]] by [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] forces.

{{Station-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]'' {{1st}}
